title: Swedish Meat Balls
ingredients: 1 can Campbell's cream of mushroom soup
instructions: Mix together the ground beef, onion, egg, bread crumbs, milk, brown sugar, salt, pepper, nutmeg, and allspice.
Roll the mixture into small balls and place in a lightly greased casserole pan.
Heat the cream of mushroom soup and water until combined.
Pour the soup mixture over the meatballs.
Bake covered at 350 degrees F for 20 minutes.
Reduce heat to 325 degrees F and bake for 40 more minutes.
Serve with noodles, rice, or mashed potatoes.
notes: A favorite first family recipe from Oma's Cookbook
